{{Quote|It is a naturally unsettling experience to face the lord of the Noghri.|Ir'khaim|<ref name="The Last Command">''[[The Last Command]]''</ref>}}
'''Ir'khaim''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] and the [[Dynast]] of [[clan Kihm'bar]].

The Noghri elder accompanied [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] to [[Khabarakh]]'s village outside [[Nystao]] when the former member of [[Imperial Noghri Commando Team 22]] returned there after his failed [[Mission to Kashyyyk (Thrawn campaign)|mission]] to [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] to assassinate [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]].

Ir'khaim, though loyal to Thrawn, the Grand Admiral, was defensive of his clan and of Khabarakh, almost engaging in a brawl with [[Rukh/Legends|Rukh]] when the other Noghri admitted his suspicion that Khabarakh was hiding something.

Later, when Leia appeared before the [[Grand Dukha]] in Nystao, one of the assembled Dynasts, [[Vor'corkh]], was hostile, but Ir'khaim said he would hear her out, inspiring a majority of the Dynasts to agree and overrule Vor'corkh.
